data.name: filterSystemLogCheckBox.Text
data.value: Read onl&y cluster events from the System log

data.name: eventIdsInstructionsLabel.Text
data.value: Enter ID numbers and/or ID ranges separated by comma. To exclude criteria, type a minus sign first. For example: 1, 3, 5-99, -76

data.name: instructionsLabel1.Text
data.value: Select the criteria for which you want to display events.
